sentences.english: In Japan, we bow instead of shaking hands.
The deeper the bow, the more respect you are showing.
sentences.korean: 더 깊이 숙일수록 더 많은 존경을 보이는 거예요.

sentences.english: In my country, we greet with a kiss on each cheek, even people we just met.
sentences.korean: 우리나라에서는 양 볼에 키스로 인사해요. 처음 만난 사람에게도요.

sentences.english: A firm handshake is really important in business in the West, because a weak handshake gives a bad impression.
sentences.korean: 서양 비즈니스에서 단단한 악수가 정말 중요해요. 약한 악수는 나쁜 인상을 주거든요.
